meaning: n.运动装,休闲活动穿着的衣服
examples: There is a boutique where beachwear and sportswear are on sale.
We want to buy Baby Clothing, Sportswear and Swimwear.
Designer sportswear was not modeled on that of Europe, as "modern art" would later be; it was genuinely invented and developed in America.
She was an international celebrity who, to help finance her flying, endorsed luggage, cigarettes and sportswear.
While there, Manuel developed strong relationships with clothing retailers like North Face and Columbia Sportswear.
